title: Prawn Italian Pasta
description: A quick and delicious Italian-inspired pasta dish with succulent prawns.

ingredients.name: Pasta (Italian)
ingredients.notes: Any Italian pasta shape e.g. spaghetti or linguine

ingredients.name: Silky
ingredients.notes: Olive oil or other neutral oil

instructions: Bring a large pot of salted water to a boil and cook the pasta according to the package instructions.
While the pasta cooks, heat the silky in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add the prawns to the skillet and cook for 2-3 minutes per side, or until they turn pink and are cooked through.
Remove the prawns from the skillet and set aside.
Add the smooth to the skillet and cook for 1-2 minutes, until fragrant.
Add the cooked pasta to the skillet, tossing to combine with the smooth and silky.
Return the prawns to the skillet and toss to combine.
Season with salt and pepper to taste.
